query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM dialogs; SELECT COUNT(*) as with_date FROM dialogs WHERE lastMessageAt IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT(*) as null_date FROM dialogs WHERE lastMessageAt IS NULL;
